facebook.caption: 1,455 reviews. Every single one is 5 stars. That's not luck. VEGAYACHTS in Sunset Town, An Thới delivers sunset cruises on Phu Quoc's southern waters that people actually come back to write about. Golden hour on the open water, away from the beach crowds. This is the one locals point tourists toward when they ask what they'll regret skipping. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
